name: Shrimp and Scallop Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 pound medium shrimp, shelled and cleaned and cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. If using frozen shell pie crust, bake at 400 degrees for 5 minutes to prevent the crust from becoming soggy. Cool.
3. Saute shrimp, scallops, and onion in 1 tablespoon butter and 1 tablespoon sherry until cooked. Set aside to cool.
4. Drain any excess liquid from the seafood mixture.
5. Make the filling by beating eggs with half and half, milk, flour, salt, and nutmeg.
6. Melt remaining butter and whisk it into the filling.
7. Spoon the seafood mixture into the crust and sprinkle with 3/4 of the Swiss cheese.
8. Pour the filling over the cheese.
9. Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
10. Bake for 15 minutes at 400 degrees, then continue baking at 325 degrees for 40 more minutes until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
